description_long: This is a modern sectional sofa with a right-facing chaise, upholstered in a smooth, medium-gray fabric. The sofa features three seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all of which are uniform in size and appear to be firmly attached. The armrests are straight, low-profile, and padded, matching the overall minimalist aesthetic. The legs are slender, black, and metal, slightly angled and positioned at the corners and under the chaise for support. The backrest is straight and continuous, providing a clean-lined silhouette without any visible tufting or decorative stitching. The upholstery is solid gray with a matte finish, giving the sofa a contemporary and versatile look suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern gray sectional sofa with a right-facing chaise, straight padded armrests, and slender black metal legs. The design is minimalist with uniform cushions and a smooth, matte fabric finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the sofa, three seat and back cushions, and the right-facing chaise extension.
description_view_1: Side view from the chaise end, highlighting the depth of the chaise and the straight, padded armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the arrangement of the sofa's legs along the back edge.
description_view_3: Side view from the standard seat end, showing the armrest and the sectional connection to the chaise.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all attached and evenly spaced, with a sectional chaise extension.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low-profile, padded armrests at both ends, matching the sofa's height and covered in the same gray fabric.
attribute_leg_design: Six slender, black metal legs positioned at the corners and under the chaise, slightly angled and exposed for a modern look.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest with three attached, uniform cushions, medium height, and no visible tufting or decorative details.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid gray fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
